title: 2D-to-3D Mapping Spec v1

changeRequest.goal: Freeze one deterministic mapping contract for coordinate, matrix, and hit-tolerance semantics across runtime and engine bridge.
changeRequest.impact: governance and integration contract only; no runtime behavior change
changeRequest.cleanup: No runtime cleanup in this task; this file becomes the single spec reference for W1 contract alignment.
changeRequest.tests: JSON parse validity only for this artifact; behavior validation is covered by W1-T04 scenario baselines.

hitPointSemantic.rule: hit-test adapter exposes world-space query point without screen-space reinterpretation

matrixAndTransform.transformSource: BoxTransformSource(x, y, width, height, rotation?, flipX?, flipY?)
matrixAndTransform.serializationRule: any downstream svg serialization must consume resolved matrix output, not recompute from raw fields

lodAndDprPolicy.highZoomRule: if viewportScale >= 2 and deviceDpr valid, enforce at least deviceDpr
lodAndDprPolicy.phaseRule: pan/zoom/drag/precision keep full overlay fidelity; performance strategy uses scheduling/preview rather than policy-level semantic drift

singleEntryRules.name: Geometry payload resolution
singleEntryRules.rule: Runtime code must not duplicate geometry-merge logic outside this entry.

singleEntryRules.name: Adaptive tolerance resolution
singleEntryRules.rule: Callers may pass tuning overrides, but default semantics and formula ownership remain centralized in this entry.

singleEntryRules.name: Node transform resolution
singleEntryRules.rule: All matrix/inverse derivation should reuse this path to avoid rotation/flip drift.

singleEntryRules.name: Render policy resolution
singleEntryRules.rule: Phase-specific DPR/quality decisions must be expressed through this policy function.

nonGoals: No API rename in this task.
No engine runtime behavior patch in this task.
No backend tier policy change in this task.
acceptance: Coordinate semantics are explicit and single-sourced.
Matrix order and inverse derivation are explicit.
Tolerance defaults and formula are explicit with guard rails.
Single-entry conversion points are documented to prevent duplicated semantic definitions.
